creator: _jkrow
caption:
Okay, I do see the hype 🏁

Our trip to @visitdelaware lined up perfectly with the NASCAR All-Star weekend at Dover Motor Speedway’s @monstermile and WOWWW, it was an experience 

👉 Also good to know: you don’t need race tickets to have a good time here! Access to the Fan Zone is FREE (!!) and open to the public with food, games, live entertainment

📍Save this for your East Coast USA bucket list and comment “DELAWARE” for our full 3-day weekend itinerary! 

#VisitDE @nascar

pinned_places: Save this for your East Coast USA bucket list and comment “DELAWARE” for our full 3-day weekend itinerary!

transcription.text: This is one of the biggest events in Delaware. And you're gonna need these. Welcome, race fans, to the Dover Motor Speedway! This is my first NAVCAR weekend, it's a monster mile. You think it's the same as watching it on TV? It's absolutely not. Drivers, start your engines! The second those engines started and the cars started flying by at 200 miles an hour, I immediately understood why people plan entire trips to see this in person. The sounds of the engines vibrate straight through your chest and the energy's contagious. You can definitely tell this is an event that people wait all year for. The race is only part of it, though. Outside the stadium, there's food, games, live entertainment, and tons of activities in the Fan Zone. Visit Delaware even had a Miles Beach set up with real beach sand. This is important to know if you're visiting because you don't even need tickets to have a good time. Fan Zone here is completely free and open to the public. So if you're looking for unique things to do in Delaware, you're gonna wanna add a NAVCAR weekend to your list.
